spec_match.rationale: Excellent reference block illustrating both the target origin manifest updates and the source well-known association schemas.

interactive.rationale: Good. Contains an interactive live probe capability audit checking system status and a comparison toggler panel.

edge_cases.rationale: Deeply details four real-world migration scenarios: subdomain apex, rebrand domain merges, scheme moves, and port redirects.

references.rationale: Includes the canonical tracking ChromeStatus link under see also references.

design_system.rationale: Sleek split side-by-side layout grids, borders, and clean tables.
